documentation.how_to_use:
Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/m5stick-nemo && python3 m5stick-nemo.py --help`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/m5stick-nemo && cat README.md`; `cd toolboxes/m5stick-nemo && ls -la`. M5Stick-NEMO
Firmware for high-tech pranks and digital self-defense on M5Stack ESP32 Devices.
documentation.when_to_use:
Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [ble_4_x, ble_5_x, ble_mesh] in the Bluetooth category. Fits when the engagement needs: M5Stick-NEMO
Firmware for high-tech pranks and digital self-defense on M5Stack ESP32 Devices.
documentation.why_to_use:
Prefer this tool because: M5Stick-NEMO
Firmware for high-tech pranks and digital self-defense on M5Stack ESP32 Devices.
